title: OpenAPI admin API endpoints
summary: Expose preview, save, diff, and reimport over the admin API. All endpoints re-parse server-side from the supplied source — the client cannot inject operations the spec doesn't contain.
constraints: blocks on task-16 (Gateway must expose ConnectOpenAPIBackend)
Spec is always re-parsed server-side from source — operations list from client is never trusted
All new endpoints under /api/v1/ prefix per existing convention
SSRF guard from parser package enforced on URL source

title: OpenAPI admin UI
summary: Operator-facing flow for adding an OpenAPI-spec-backed server and re-importing it later.
constraints: blocks on task-17 (API endpoints must be live)
Preview-then-save flow — UI never sends a hand-built operations list, only disabled_tools curation
Empty list of disabled_tools = enable everything; UI must send [] explicitly when operator un-checks then re-checks
Mobile/tablet drawer states preserved from existing Layout
